requirements.label: Architecture-heavy
requirements.why: Use for requirements because this stage defines scope, constraints, goals, non-goals, and platform boundaries.

requirements.label: Fallback
requirements.why: Use if Opus is unavailable; keep the prompt strict and bounded.

design.label: System design
design.why: Use for design because this stage needs architecture consistency, interface design, and tradeoff reasoning.

design.label: Fallback
design.why: Use if Opus is unavailable; require explicit architecture-boundary checks.

tasks.label: Task decomposition
tasks.why: Use for tasks because this stage needs structured implementation sequencing and acceptance criteria.

tasks.label: Complex fallback
tasks.why: Use if task sequencing crosses multiple architecture layers.

implementation.label: Implementation
implementation.why: Use for repo-aware implementation, tests, and small refactors.

implementation.label: Fallback
implementation.why: Use if Cursor supports it and the task needs stronger reasoning.

debug.label: Debug loop
debug.why: Use for fast compiler/test error fixing.

debug.label: Deep debug
debug.why: Use for difficult architecture-level or multi-file debugging.

routine_code.label: Implementation
routine_code.why: Use for repo-aware implementation, tests, and small refactors.

routine_code.label: Fallback
routine_code.why: Use if Cursor supports it and the task needs stronger reasoning.

requirements.label: Independent review
requirements.why: Use for requirements review because this needs architecture, product, and scope validation.

requirements.label: Fallback
requirements.why: Use if GPT-5.5 Thinking is unavailable.

design.label: Architecture review
design.why: Use for design review because this checks architecture consistency, layering, and long-term platform fit.

design.label: Fallback
design.why: Use if GPT-5.5 Thinking is unavailable.

tasks.label: Sequencing review
tasks.why: Use for task review because this checks completeness, sequencing, and testability.

tasks.label: Fallback
tasks.why: Use if GPT-5.5 Thinking is unavailable.

implementation.label: Diff review
implementation.why: Use for implementation review because this checks architecture safety, tests, and hidden coupling.

implementation.label: Fallback
implementation.why: Use if GPT-5.5 Thinking is unavailable.
